signal_evidence.services_demand: In July, trading volumes were more than 20% higher than June across equities, options, and crypto. And net deposits were again over $4 billion.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We set aside an extra $100 million in marketing budget... we announced two acquisitions... and a $1 billion share repurchase authorization.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We don't charge options contract fees... we introduced industry leading rates for active traders in May... we want to offer really competitive rates to customers.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We have a lot of momentum entering the second half of the year, as our business is having a great start to Q3... so far [August] it looks a lot like July.
